name: notes-turbo
description: Notes app — Django (backend/) + Next.js (frontend/). Per-user notes and categories with optional AI assist.
author: Job

scripts.dev: echo 'Run backend and frontend in separate terminals:\n  backend:  cd backend && .venv/bin/python manage.py runserver\n  frontend: cd frontend && npm run dev' && exit 0
scripts.test: echo 'Backend: cd backend && .venv/bin/pytest\nFrontend: cd frontend && npm test' && exit 0
scripts.lint: echo 'Backend: cd backend && ruff check .\nFrontend: cd frontend && npm run lint' && exit 0
